zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Johanna Blackrod Bradshagh於1381年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布拉可洛德時，她的父親NN Bradshagh-22歲，母親NN Bradshagh-22歲。她於大約1400年與Sir William Bradshagh結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1436年11月24日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布雷蕭享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Johanna Blackrod Bradshagh was born in 1381, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, NN Bradshagh, was -22 and her mother, NN Bradshagh, was -22. She married Sir William Bradshagh about 1400. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 24 November 1436, in Bradshaw, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

Elle a épousé Sir William Bradshagh environ 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 novembre 1436, à Bradshaw, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Johanna Blackrod Bradshagh 1381 in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater NN Bradshagh -22 und ihre Mutter NN Bradshagh -22. Sie hat um 1400 Sir William Bradshagh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. November 1436 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Bradshaw, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Johanna Blackrod Bradshagh(이)가 1381년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 NN Bradshagh(은)는 -22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 NN Bradshagh(은)는 -22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 Sir William Bradshagh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 11월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 브래드쇼에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Johanna Blackrod Bradshagh родилась в 1381 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени NN Bradshagh было -22 год, а матери, которую звали NN Bradshagh, -22. Она умерла 24 ноября 1436 г. в местности брадшав, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
